questions.question_text_full: Select the number from the given options to complete the series: 25, 30, 40, 55, 75, ___
questions.notes: The options are labeled a, b, c, d in the image, mapped to 1, 2, 3, 4 respectively.

questions.question_text_full: The position(s) of how many letters will remain unchanged if all the letters in the word ‘ENTOMB’ are arranged in English alphabetical order?
questions.notes: The options are labeled a, b, c, d in the image, mapped to 1, 2, 3, 4 respectively.

questions.question_text_full: Six words Eat, Cry, Play, Sleep, Run and Bath are written on different faces of a dice. Three positions of this dice are shown in the figure. Find the word on the face opposite to Eat.
questions.notes: Only option 'a' (Play) is visible. The question is incomplete as options 2, 3, and 4 are missing from the provided image.

warnings: Question 9 is incomplete; only one option is visible.
